title: ctenitis clathrata
intro: Ctenitis clathrata, also known as the netted wood fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The medicinal properties of Ctenitis clathrata include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of the plant include the potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, and it is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and capsules.
